**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Kangdalai Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is an extremely absurd case of system misclassification; its essence is a 'zero-employee shell company that sells food and does weak-current engineering.' The forensic engine has completely wiped out the underlying preset multi-million-level manufacturing supply chain data of Apple Inc. The official commercial registry system blindly categorized it into the heavy-asset 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing' simply because its name contains the four characters 'Electronic Technology.' However, the forensic probe instantly pierced this disguise: although its paid-in capital is as high as 12.5 million RMB, this ten-plus-year-old shell established in 2009 astonishingly has a glaringly obvious '0' insured headcount for 2024! Its registered address is located at 'Room 106, Building 21, Zijin City, No. 29-1 Muxuyuan Street.' In Nanjing, Zijin City is a highly typical large residential community. Employing 0 workers to 'manufacture' electronic devices in a residential ground-floor dwelling or commercial space? This is an absolute trampling of common sense. Even more comical is its business license, where the very first item conspicuously states: 'wholesale and retail of pre-packaged food and bulk food'! Only then does it list 'sales of computers, building materials, office equipment' and 'network engineering design and construction.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronics manufacturing plant. This is a 'pure Zero-Employee Universal Trading Shell operating out of a residential ground floor and weak-current engineering contractor.' The multi-million-level registered capital is highly likely a false paid-in amount designed to meet certain bidding qualifications or fund-routing needs.
